# QA Plan: Grid Battle Controller Epic
**Date**: 2026-05-02
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 10 stories across 1 epic (sprint-5 critical path)
**Engine**: Godot 4.6 (GDScript) — GdUnit4 v6.1.2
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-5.md` (S5-01..S5-11 = qa-plan + 10 stories)
**Epic**: `production/epics/grid-battle-controller/EPIC.md`
**Governing ADR**: `docs/architecture/ADR-0014-grid-battle-controller.md`
**GDD**: `design/gdd/grid-battle.md` (1259 LoC; MVP subset only per ADR-0014 §0)
**Pre-impl baseline**: 757 cases / 0 errors / 0 failures / 0 orphans / Exit 0 (post S4-02)

---

## Test Summary

| Story | Type | Automated Test Required | Manual Verification Required |
|-------|------|-------------------------|------------------------------|
| 001 — class skeleton + 8-param DI + _exit_tree | Logic (skeleton) | Unit — `tests/unit/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_lifecycle_test.gd` (≥4 tests) | None |
| 002 — BattleUnit Resource + registry + tag-based fate detection | Logic | Unit — `tests/unit/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_registry_test.gd` (≥3 tests) | None |
| 003 — 2-state FSM + 10-action filter + click dispatch | Logic | Unit — `tests/unit/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_fsm_test.gd` (≥6 tests; 20-combination sweep) | None |
| 004 — MOVE action + unit_moved signal | Logic | Unit — `tests/unit/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_move_test.gd` (≥5 tests) | None |
| 005 — ATTACK + _resolve_attack chain + DamageCalc + HPStatusController | Logic | Unit — `tests/unit/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_attack_test.gd` (≥10 tests) **+ Integration recommended** (cross-cutting; see below) | Smoke check (chapter-prototype equivalent attack path) |
| 006 — per-turn action consumption + auto-handoff + token spend | Logic | Unit — `tests/unit/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_turn_consumption_test.gd` (≥5 tests) | None |
| 007 — 5-turn limit + battle_outcome_resolved | Logic | Unit — `tests/unit/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_turn_limit_test.gd` (≥4 tests) | None |
| 008 — hidden fate counters + signal channel + hidden-semantic guard | Logic | Unit — `tests/unit/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_fate_test.gd` (≥6 tests) | Manual verify: Battle HUD epic (sprint-5 S5-12/13) does NOT subscribe to `hidden_fate_condition_progressed` |
| 009 — cross-ADR _exit_tree audit (TD-057 final) | Config/Data (audit) | None new — doc updates + smoke regression PASS | Manual: read TurnOrderRunner source + verify _exit_tree |
| 010 — epic terminal: perf + 4 lints + 6 BalanceConstants + evidence rollup | Config/Data + Logic (perf) | Perf tests `tests/performance/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_perf_test.gd` (4 tests) + 4 lint scripts (`tools/ci/lint_grid_battle_controller_*.sh`) | Smoke check post-epic + evidence rollup `production/qa/evidence/grid_battle_controller_verification_summary.md` |

**Test count math**: 4 + 3 + 6 + 5 + 10 + 5 + 4 + 6 + 0 + 4 (perf) = **+47 minimum new test cases**. Sprint-5 baseline target = **757 → ≥800-810** (vs story-010 AC-10 conservative ≥785). Final number depends on ATTACK story-005 expansion (+10 minimum, likely +12-15) + integration test suite if added (see cross-cutting recommendation).

---

## Cross-Cutting Recommendation: Integration Test for ATTACK Chain (story-005)

**Gap identified**: per-story acceptance criteria specify stub-based unit tests for every story, but EPIC.md states "Test stub strategy: extend existing `tests/helpers/map_grid_stub.gd` (from hp-status epic) + new stubs for each backend ... Tests use stubs for unit-level isolation; **integration tests use real backends**." No story explicitly creates an integration test using real backends.

**Recommendation**: Add 1 integration test file at `tests/integration/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_attack_chain_integration_test.gd` (≥3 tests) that exercises the full ATTACK chain with real backends:

1. **test_attack_with_real_damage_calc_and_hp_controller** — instantiate real DamageCalc + HPStatusController + GridBattleController + minimal MapGrid + UnitRole + TerrainEffect; trigger one ATTACK; verify damage_applied signal emitted with correct value (cross-checks formation × angle × aura × DamageCalc → HP decrement chain end-to-end)
2. **test_lethal_attack_chain_no_reentrance** — same setup + lethal damage; verify CONNECT_DEFERRED fires `_on_unit_died` AFTER `_resolve_attack` returns (not synchronously inside) — this is the load-bearing reentrance prevention test that stub-based unit tests can't fully validate
3. **test_full_turn_with_real_turn_order_runner** — wire real TurnOrderRunner; consume 4 player units' actions; verify auto-handoff to enemy turn fires + round increments

**Owner**: claude (suggest folding into story-005 epic-terminal phase OR as a separate sub-task within story-010)
**Estimated test count**: +3-5
**Why this matters**: stub-based unit tests cannot catch contract drift between stubs and shipped APIs. Story-005 specifically calls out that DamageCalc.resolve signature + HPStatusController.apply_damage 4-param signature must match shipped code; if a stub gets out of sync, tests pass while production breaks. An integration test catches this at CI time, not at sprint-6 Battle Scene wiring time.

---

## Automated Tests Required

### Story 001 — Logic (skeleton)
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_lifecycle_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- `class_name GridBattleController` registered and resolves at parse time (AC-1)
- `setup()` accepts 8 typed parameters and populates internal state (AC-2)
- `_ready()` 7-non-null assertions fire correctly when any dep is null (AC-3)
- `_ready()` connects 4 signals via CONNECT_DEFERRED (AC-5) — verify via `GameBus.input_action_fired.get_connections()` enumeration (per camera epic precedent)
- CONNECT_DEFERRED comment present in source (AC-6) — grep test or runtime introspection
- `_exit_tree()` disconnects all 4 subscriptions (AC-7) — verify post-_exit_tree connection count = 0 on relevant signals
- Missing-setup detection (AC-8) — pre-mount state proxy assertions (asserts in `_ready()` would crash test runner)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- All deps null → _ready() asserts fire
- Empty `_units` array passed to setup() → _ready() asserts fire (AC-3)
- BattleCamera passed but other deps null → mixed-failure mode

**Estimated test count**: ≥4 unit tests

---

### Story 002 — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_registry_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- `BattleUnit` Resource instantiates cleanly with all 10 @export fields populated (AC-1)
- `_units: Dictionary[int, BattleUnit]` populated correctly from `setup()` (AC-2)
- Tag-based fate-counter unit detection: tank, assassin, boss tags resolve to correct unit_ids (AC-3, AC-6)
- `_find_unit_by_tag` returns -1 for missing tag (AC-4)
- Sole-writer contract (AC-5) — covered by lint in story-010, but registry-write test asserts no unauthorized mutation path exists

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Empty units array → all 3 fate IDs = -1
- Multiple units with same tag → returns first by iteration order (or fail-fast if scenario constraint requires unique)
- BattleUnit with default-empty tag → not detected

**Estimated test count**: ≥3 unit tests

---

### Story 003 — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_fsm_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- `BattleState` enum has exactly 2 states (OBSERVATION, UNIT_SELECTED) (AC-1)
- `_is_grid_action` returns true for all 10 grid-domain actions, false for non-grid actions (AC-4)
- 20-combination sweep: 10 actions × 2 states (AC-8) — for each (action, state) pair, assert state transition + signal emission match the FSM per ADR-0014 §2
- OBSERVATION → UNIT_SELECTED transition emits `unit_selected_changed(unit_id, was_selected=-1)` (AC-5)
- Click hit-test re-resolution via Camera fallback when `ctx.target_coord == Vector2i.ZERO` (AC-6)
- Off-grid sentinel `Vector2i(-1, -1)` early-returns silently (AC-6)
- Acted-this-turn click guard: silent no-op on already-acted unit (AC-7)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Same unit clicked twice in OBSERVATION → first selects, second deselects (AC-5 UNIT_SELECTED arm)
- Click on enemy unit in OBSERVATION → no selection (selection only owns side=0)
- All 10 grid-domain actions reaching the controller (closed signal-set per turn-order AC-GB-16 precedent)

**Estimated test count**: ≥6 unit tests

---

### Story 004 — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_move_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- `is_tile_in_move_range` validates Manhattan distance ≤ unit move_range (AC-2)
- Occupied tile fails range check (AC-2)
- Impassable tile (RIVER) fails range check (AC-2)
- `_handle_move` validates → `_do_move` updates position + facing (AC-3, AC-4)
- MapGrid occupancy bookkeeping: clear_occupant + set_occupant called in correct order (AC-4)
- `unit_moved(unit_id, from, to)` signal emitted exactly once after position update (AC-5, AC-7)
- Re-entrancy guard: second call same turn = silent no-op (AC-8)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Move to current position (zero distance) — should fail or no-op
- Move to occupied tile (own unit) — should fail
- Move to occupied tile (enemy unit) — should fail (move ≠ attack)
- Move to RIVER tile — should fail
- Move at exact range boundary — should succeed

**Estimated test count**: ≥5 unit tests

---

### Story 005 — Logic + Integration risk
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_attack_test.gd`

**What to test (per AC-1..AC-9)**:
- `is_tile_in_attack_range` validates: enemy unit on tile + within attack_range (AC-1)
- `_count_adjacent_allies` returns correct count (AC-4)
- `_has_adjacent_command_aura` detects 유비 (command_aura passive) adjacency (AC-5)
- `_attack_angle` collapses 8-direction to "front"/"side"/"rear" against defender.facing (AC-3)
- Multiplier verification (AC-8) — per ADR-0014 §Validation §1:
  - 황충 (rear_specialist) attacking from rear → angle_mult == 1.75
  - Same attacker from side → 1.25; from front → 1.0
  - Attacker with 2 adjacent allies → formation_mult == 1.10
  - Attacker with 4 adjacent allies → formation_mult capped at 1.20
  - 유비 adjacent to attacker → aura_mult == 1.15; not adjacent → 1.0
- `ResolveModifiers` Resource extension: 3 new fields (`formation_atk_bonus`, `angle_mult`, `aura_mult`) ship with correct defaults (AC-7)
- `DamageCalc.resolve(...)` STATIC call — not instance call (AC-2 step 7) — verify by stubbing static method or by reading source (lint precedent in story-010 AC-4)
- `HPStatusController.apply_damage(unit_id, damage, attack_type, source_flags)` 4-PARAM signature (AC-2 step 8)
- `apply_death_consequences` invoked EXPLICITLY before victory check (AC-2 step 9)
- `damage_applied(attacker_id, defender_id, damage)` signal emitted after apply_damage (AC-6)
- Re-entrancy regression: lethal damage does NOT cause `_check_battle_end` reentrance — CONNECT_DEFERRED is load-bearing (AC-9)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Attack with 0 formation_count — formation_mult = 1.0
- Attack with formation_count > 4 (cap) — formation_mult = 1.20
- Defender with `facing` at boundary values (0..3 each direction)
- Attack at exact attack_range boundary (1 for melee, 2 for 황충)
- Attacker is `rear_specialist` AND attacking from front — angle_mult = 1.0 (passive only modifies rear bonus)
- Multiple `command_aura` allies adjacent — aura_mult still 1.15 (not stacking)
- Defender HP exactly equals damage (lethal-by-1) — apply_death_consequences fires
- Damage > defender HP — clamps + apply_death_consequences fires once

**Estimated test count**: ≥10 unit tests (likely 12-15 in practice given multiplier-table coverage)

**Cross-cutting integration test recommendation** — see top of plan: add `tests/integration/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_attack_chain_integration_test.gd` (≥3 tests with real backends).

---

### Story 006 — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_turn_consumption_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- `_consume_unit_action` populates `_acted_this_turn[unit_id] = true` AND calls `_turn_runner.spend_action_token(unit_id)` (AC-2) — verify both via stub
- `_any_player_unit_can_act` excludes acted units AND dead units (AC-3, AC-9)
- Auto-handoff: 4-unit roster + 4 sequential consumes → 4th call triggers `end_player_turn()` (AC-4, AC-8)
- `end_player_turn()` resets `_acted_this_turn`, deselects, hands off to TurnOrderRunner (AC-5)
- Move-then-attack-in-range chained = 1 action token (AC-6) — single _consume_unit_action call regardless of MOVE+ATTACK chain
- Acted-unit click guard: silent no-op (AC-7)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Empty player roster → `_any_player_unit_can_act` returns false immediately
- All player units dead → `_any_player_unit_can_act` returns false
- Mid-turn dead unit (HP set to 0 by other system) — excluded from "can act" check
- `_consume_unit_action` called on enemy unit (side=1) — should be no-op or assert (define behavior)

**Estimated test count**: ≥5 unit tests

---

### Story 007 — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_turn_limit_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- `_max_turns` populated from BalanceConstants `MAX_TURNS_PER_BATTLE` = 5 (AC-1)
- `_on_round_started(round_num=6)` fires `battle_outcome_resolved("TURN_LIMIT_REACHED", fate_data)` exactly once (AC-3, AC-8)
- `_check_battle_end` returns true when all enemies dead OR all players dead (AC-6)
- Victory check: lethal to last enemy → emits `battle_outcome_resolved("VICTORY_ANNIHILATION", fate_data)` (AC-5, AC-9)
- Defeat check: lethal to last player → emits `battle_outcome_resolved("DEFEAT_ANNIHILATION", fate_data)` (AC-5)
- CR-7 evaluation order: VICTORY before DEFEAT when both conditions met simultaneously (per EC-GB-02)
- Terminal state: post-emission, all click handlers silently no-op (AC-7)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Round 5 → no emission (exactly at limit)
- Round 6 → emission (boundary trigger)
- Simultaneous death of last player and last enemy → VICTORY wins per CR-7
- `_battle_over = true` already → second emit-attempt suppressed (no double-emit)

**Estimated test count**: ≥4 unit tests

---

### Story 008 — Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_fate_test.gd`
**What to test**:
- 5 hidden counters initialize to zero/false (AC-1)
- Rear-attack increments `_fate_rear_attacks` + emits `hidden_fate_condition_progressed("rear_attacks", N)` (AC-2)
- Formation-turns increments at `_on_round_started` if any player unit has adjacent ally (AC-3)
- Assassin-kills increments when `_fate_assassin_unit_id` is `_last_attacker_id` AND defender side=1 (AC-4)
- Boss-killed sets `_fate_boss_killed = true` when `_fate_boss_unit_id` dies (AC-5)
- Tank HP queried on-demand from HPStatusController in fate_data snapshot (AC-1, AC-7)
- `fate_data` Dictionary structure correct: keys = "tank_alive_hp_pct", "rear_attacks", "formation_turns", "assassin_kills", "boss_killed" (AC-7)
- **Hidden semantic preservation test** (AC-8): enumerate `hidden_fate_condition_progressed` connections; assert no Battle HUD class subscribes (current count = 0; future-proof against accidental subscription)
- Full sweep: simulate fixture with all 4 condition types → all counters increment + signals fire correctly (AC-9)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Fixture lacks tank/assassin/boss tag → corresponding counter dormant; no errors
- Multiple rear attacks same turn → counter increments once per attack
- Assassin attacks but doesn't kill → no increment (kill required)
- Tank HP = 0 (tank dead) → fate_data["tank_alive_hp_pct"] = 0.0 (defined behavior)
- `_last_attacker_id` cleared between turns (don't carry stale attacker id into next turn)

**Estimated test count**: ≥6 unit tests

---

### Story 010 — Config/Data + Logic (perf)
**Test file paths**:
- `tests/performance/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller_perf_test.gd` (4 perf tests; AC-1)
- `tools/ci/lint_grid_battle_controller_signal_emission_outside_battle_domain.sh` (AC-2)
- `tools/ci/lint_grid_battle_controller_static_state.sh` (AC-3)
- `tools/ci/lint_grid_battle_controller_external_combat_math.sh` (AC-4)
- `tools/ci/lint_balance_entities_grid_battle_controller.sh` (AC-5)

**What to test (perf)**:
- `test_handle_input_action_under_0_05ms` — 1000-iteration p99 < 0.05ms
- `test_resolve_attack_under_0_5ms` — full chain p99 < 0.5ms (controller multipliers → DamageCalc.resolve → HPStatusController.apply_damage)
- `test_100_synthetic_battle_actions_under_100ms` — full-throughput avg < 1ms per action
- `test_setup_under_0_01ms_for_8_units` — DI setup() with 8-unit roster < 0.01ms

**What to test (lints)**:
- No `GameBus\..*\.emit\(` calls in `src/feature/grid_battle/grid_battle_controller.gd` (5 LOCAL signals only)
- No `^static var ` declarations in controller source (battle_runtime_state ownership)
- No `formation_atk_bonus|attack_angle|adjacent_command_aura|_count_adjacent_allies|_attack_angle|_has_adjacent_command_aura` in unauthorized files (allowlist: `grid_battle_controller.gd` + `damage_calc.gd` + `tests/helpers/`)
- 6 BalanceConstants keys present + correctly typed: `MAX_TURNS_PER_BATTLE` + `FATE_TANK_HP_THRESHOLD` + `FATE_ASSASSIN_KILLS_THRESHOLD` + `FATE_REAR_ATTACKS_THRESHOLD` + `FATE_FORMATION_TURNS_THRESHOLD` + `FATE_BOSS_KILLED_REQUIRED`

**Edge cases to cover** (perf):
- Perf test under `SKIP_PERF_BUDGETS=1` env var (per `.github/workflows/tests.yml` line 110 precedent) — runs but doesn't gate on flaky CI timings
- Perf test with maximum-roster fixture (8 units) — p99 still under budget
- Reference-hardware validation deferred to `perf-nightly.yml` (TBD)

**Estimated test count**: 4 perf tests + 4 lint scripts (Logic + Config/Data hybrid)

## Manual QA Checklist

### Story 005 — ATTACK chain (Smoke)
**Verification method**: Smoke check (chapter-prototype equivalent attack path executed against shipped controller)
**Who must sign off**: claude (developer self-verify post-impl); record in `production/qa/evidence/grid_battle_controller_verification_summary.md`
**Evidence to capture**: short scripted-fixture run that mirrors chapter-prototype's `_do_attack` path; assert damage_applied signal fires + correct HP decrement + no reentrance crash

Checklist:
- [ ] 황충 (rear_specialist) attacks enemy from rear → 1.50 × passive 1.16 ≈ 1.75x angle multiplier observed (within 1% tolerance)
- [ ] 유비 (command_aura) adjacent to attacker → +15% damage observed
- [ ] Formation count cap at +20% verified empirically (2-ally vs 4-ally vs 6-ally fixtures)
- [ ] Lethal damage fires `_on_unit_died` AFTER `_resolve_attack` returns (not synchronously inside) — verified via debug log timestamps
- [ ] No GdUnit4 errors / warnings in test output

### Story 008 — Hidden semantic preservation (Manual)
**Verification method**: Manual inspection at sprint-5 close (after Battle HUD epic S5-12/13 scaffolded)
**Who must sign off**: claude (verify Battle HUD ADR-0015 declares NO subscription to `hidden_fate_condition_progressed`)
**Evidence to capture**: ADR-0015 document text — explicit statement that Battle HUD does not consume the hidden signal channel

Checklist:
- [ ] ADR-0015 Battle HUD §Signal Subscription Contract explicitly excludes `hidden_fate_condition_progressed`
- [ ] Battle HUD epic stories (sprint-5 S5-13 scaffold) contain no reference to `hidden_fate_condition_progressed`
- [ ] Test in story-008 (AC-8) enumerates connections at runtime — passes consistently across CI runs

### Story 009 — Cross-ADR _exit_tree audit (Manual)
**Verification method**: Source-code read + smoke regression
**Who must sign off**: claude (audit scope is 2 files; outcome documented in tech-debt-register)
**Evidence to capture**: tech-debt-register.md TD-057 status update + cross-ADR R-7 cross-link updates

Checklist:
- [ ] HPStatusController `_exit_tree()` body explicitly disconnects every autoload-sourced subscription (verified at ADR-0014 authoring; story-009 confirms still complete)
- [ ] TurnOrderRunner `_exit_tree()` body status confirmed (read source fresh) — either present-and-complete (Path A: false alarm) OR retrofit shipped same patch (Path B)
- [ ] TD-057 status logged as RESOLVED (Path A or Path B)
- [ ] ADR-0013 R-7 + ADR-0014 R-7 + ADR-0014 §Implementation Notes updated with "RESOLVED via grid-battle-controller story-009 audit (2026-05-XX)"

### Story 010 — Epic-terminal evidence rollup (Manual)
**Verification method**: Documentation completeness check
**Who must sign off**: claude (epic-terminal commit author verifies summary doc captures all 12 ACs)
**Evidence to capture**: `production/qa/evidence/grid_battle_controller_verification_summary.md` (single rollup doc per epic-terminal precedent)

Checklist:
- [ ] 5 controller-LOCAL signals declared on GridBattleController class (`unit_selected_changed`, `unit_moved`, `damage_applied`, `battle_outcome_resolved`, `hidden_fate_condition_progressed`)
- [ ] 4 lint scripts created + chmod +x + wired into `.github/workflows/tests.yml` + all PASS
- [ ] 6 BalanceConstants keys present in `assets/data/balance/balance_entities.json`
- [ ] ResolveModifiers Resource extension shipped (3 new fields, additive, back-compat)
- [ ] Cross-ADR audit (story-009) outcome documented
- [ ] Per-event perf budget compliance verified (or `SKIP_PERF_BUDGETS=1` exempted with reference-hardware deferred to `perf-nightly.yml`)
- [ ] Final test baseline ≥800 cases / 0 errors / 0 failures / 0 orphans / Exit 0
- [ ] EPIC.md status `Ready` → `Complete (2026-05-XX)`
- [ ] `production/epics/index.md` Feature layer 2/13 → 3/13

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before sprint-5 close (`/smoke-check sprint`):

1. **Game launches** without crash on Godot 4.6 (M4 Pro Metal validated; CI Linux Vulkan validated via existing CI)
2. **GridBattleController scene mount + `_ready()`** — instantiate test scene with 4-unit fixture; verify all 4 signal subscriptions registered (CONNECT_DEFERRED for unit_died, unit_turn_started, round_started + GameBus.input_action_fired)
3. **Full ATTACK chain executes** — black-box test: input action `attack_confirm` → controller routes through FSM → resolves multipliers → DamageCalc.resolve → HPStatusController.apply_damage → damage_applied signal emitted → no reentrance
4. **5-turn limit enforced** — fixture battle plays out 5 rounds without victory → round 6 entry fires `battle_outcome_resolved("TURN_LIMIT_REACHED", fate_data)` exactly once
5. **Save/load cycle** (regression check, not new functionality) — existing save-manager tests still pass post-grid-battle-controller integration; controller does NOT touch save schema (battle state is ephemeral per ADR-0014 §3 + battle_runtime_state ownership)
6. **Performance within budget** — perf-nightly.yml (TBD) or local M4 Pro spot-check: 100 actions <100ms; per-attack <0.5ms; per-event handler <0.05ms
7. **All 4 grid-battle-controller lints + 5 camera lints + prior lint suite PASS** in CI
8. **Cross-ADR _exit_tree audit closed** (story-009) — TD-057 final status logged

*Smoke tests verified by developer via `/smoke-check sprint` after S5-11 (epic terminal) commits. Reference this list when running that skill.*

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|--------------|--------------|---------------------|
| (none required this sprint) | Grid-battle-controller is a backend integration epic; no user-facing surface ships in sprint-5. Battle HUD scaffold (S5-13) is documentation-only. **Playtest discipline activates at sprint-6** when Battle Scene wires controller + Camera + (forthcoming) Battle HUD into a 장판파 chapter — that's the first GO/PIVOT decision point. | 0 (sprint-5) | n/a |

**Sprint-6 forecast**: minimum 1 internal playtest session with full chapter-1 surface (chapter-prototype-equivalent UX + production assets + real animations). Sign-off requirement: written session notes + first-impressions documenting whether the SRPG concept "lands" against the 영걸전 reference frame.

---

## Definition of Done — Sprint-5 / Grid Battle Controller Epic

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic stories (story-010 perf tests + 4 lint scripts; stories 001-008 unit tests)
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for stories 005 (smoke), 008 (HUD non-subscription), 009 (TD-057), 010 (epic-terminal rollup)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (`/smoke-check sprint` after S5-11)
- [ ] No regressions introduced (full GdUnit4 regression: ≥800 cases / 0 errors / 0 failures / 0 orphans / Exit 0)
- [ ] Code reviewed (godot-gdscript-specialist on each story per /code-review skill; godot-specialist 3-pass review for cross-system architectural judgment per sprint-4 retro AI #3)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] EPIC.md updated `Ready` → `Complete (2026-05-XX)`; `production/epics/index.md` Feature layer 2/13 → 3/13
- [ ] sprint-status.yaml updated per 200-byte cap discipline (S3-05 active)

---

## Open Questions Surface to Sprint-5 Implementation

1. **Story-005 stub vs real DamageCalc/HPStatusController**: per acceptance criteria, story-005 unit tests use stubs; per EPIC.md test stub strategy, integration tests use real backends. Recommendation above adds 1 integration test file (≥3 tests). Decision deferred to story-005 author at impl time.
2. **5 fate-condition thresholds final ownership** (story-010 AC-5): may shift from `MAX_TURNS_PER_BATTLE` adjacent placement to a `destiny/` namespace within balance_entities.json when Destiny Branch ADR ships sprint-6. MVP places under top-level keys; additive migration when ADR sprints.
3. **TurnOrderRunner _exit_tree status (story-009 AC-2)**: unverified at QA plan authoring. Outcome dictates Path A (false alarm) vs Path B (small retrofit). Both paths are bounded; either resolves TD-057 final.
4. **`SKIP_PERF_BUDGETS=1` env var on perf tests** (story-010 AC-1): existing precedent at `.github/workflows/tests.yml:110`; reference-hardware perf validation deferred to `perf-nightly.yml` (not yet shipped — separate sprint concern, not blocking sprint-5).
5. **ResolveModifiers Resource location** (story-005 AC-7): "or wherever it lives" — actual file path needs verification at story-005 implementation time (likely `src/feature/damage_calc/resolve_modifiers.gd` per damage-calc epic conventions).
